column7: Promotes steady tillering; apply at 15 and 35 DAT for irrigated lowland conditions.
Supports irrigated lowland establishment; balanced NPK improves plant stand uniformity.
Supports irrigated lowland N demand; sulfur addresses common S deficiency in intensive paddies.
Strengthens stalk and improves irrigated lowland performance; reduces lodging at high N rates.
Zinc component corrects common Zn deficiency in irrigated lowlands; improves plant vigor and yield.
Nano-phosphate improves P use efficiency in irrigated soils; bacterial component reduces P fixation losses.
Enhances soil microbial diversity in intensively farmed irrigated paddies; reduces soil fatigue from continuous cropping.
Azolla reduces inorganic N input in irrigated fields; biomass decomposition improves soil structure over cropping seasons.
Foliar application supplements soil-applied fertilizers; NPK spray corrects mid-season deficiency in irrigated lowland paddies.
